item.name: Jibanyan Couch Medal
item.description: This medal can be used to summon forth the Jibanyan couch, a mysterious piece of furniture designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Jibanyan.

mount.name: Jibanyan Couch
mount.action: Summon forth the Jibanyan couch. A mysterious piece of furniture designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Jibanyan.
mount.description: Despite being modeled upon Jibanyan, an Earthbound Yo-kai, this couch is able to fly. It is said to be so comfortable as to turn men and Yo-kai alike into useless layabouts.
mount.tooltip:
Sluggards! Layabouts!
Good-for-nothing reprobates!
- Seigetsu the Enlightened
